Expected in cases where the role was granted using the internal {AccessControl-_grantRole}."},"RoleRevoked(bytes32,address,address)":{"details":"Emitted when `account` is revoked `role`. `sender` is `account`)"}},"kind":"dev","methods":{"buybackWithAuction(string,uint64,bytes,uint256)":{"params":{"_buybackSize":"Maximum units targeted for buyback (must not exceed current auction.Maturity duration is converted to seconds using DURATION_SCALAR (years * scalar = seconds).","params":{"_end":"Timestamp when sealed bidding closes.","_isin":"Human ISIN string for the issuance (used as partition identifier).","_maturityDuration":"Duration in years from bond distribution until maturity.","_offering":"Total supply ceiling (offering size) for this partition.","_pubKey":"Auctioneer public key that matches client-side sealing keys."}},"extendBondWithAuction(string,uint64,bytes,uint256)":{"details":"Always creates a PRICE auction for bond extensions.Extends the partition offering size before creating the auction.","params":{"_additionalOffering":"Additional offering size to add to the partition.","_end":"Timestamp when sealed bidding closes.","_isin":"Human ISIN string for the existing bond.","_pubKey":"Auctioneer public key that matches client-side sealing keys."}},"finaliseAuction(string,(string,address,uint256,uint256,uint8)[],(uint256,uint256,bytes)[])":{"details":"Settlement enforces a single clearing rate and emits DVPFailed when ERC20 calls 100).","params":{"_alloc":"Uniform-rate allocations produced off-chain.","_isin":"Target ISIN to settle.","_proofs":"Bidder signatures proving consent to each allocation."}},"getRoleAdmin(bytes32)":{"details":"Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}."},"getSealedBids(string)":{"params":{"_isin":"Target ISIN."},"returns":{"_0":"bids Array of sealed bids."}},"grantRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event."},"hasRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Returns `true` if `account` has been granted `role`."},"payCoupon(string,address[])":{"details":"Restricted to BOND_MANAGER_ROLEPayment is atomic for all holdersFlags bond as matured after final coupon payment","params":{"_holders":"Array of holder addresses to receive coupon payments","_isin":"ISIN string"}},"redeem(string,address[])":{"details":"Restricted to BOND_MANAGER_ROLEPasses msg.sender (BOND_MANAGER_ROLE holder) as operatorPayment is atomic for all holders","params":{"_holders":"Array of addresses holding the bonds to be redeemed and receiving WNOK payment","_isin":"ISIN string"}},"renounceRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"revokeRole(bytes32,address)":{"details":"Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event."},"supportsInterface(bytes4)":{"details":"See {IERC165-supportsInterface}."},"withdrawFailedIssuance(string)":{"params":{"_isin":"Target ISIN with failed issuance."}}},"stateVariables":{"DURATION_SCALAR":{"details":"In production: 31556926 seconds (1 year), for testing: can be minutes"},"UNIT_NOMINAL":{"details":"Used to calculate payment amounts ISIN"},"buybackWithAuction(string,uint64,bytes,uint256)":{"notice":"Creates a buyback auction for an existing bond without changing the offering ceiling."},"cancelAuction(string)":{"notice":"Cancel an params._buybackSize: Maximum units targeted for buyback (must not exceed current supply).
params._isin: Existing ISIN to buy back from.
params._pubKey: Auctioneer public key that matches client-side sealing keys.

cancelAuction(string).details: Does NOT mint bonds - only reduces offering size and reserves the ISIN partition.Sets auction status to CANCELLED and marks bond as inactive.Can cancel auctions in BIDDING or CLOSED states (status < FINALISED && status != NONE).

returns._0: bids Array of sealed bids returned by BondAuction.

params._bondAuction: Address of the BondAuction instance coordinating sealed bids.
params._bondToken: Address of the BondToken contract (single deployment for all bonds).
params._durationScalar: Duration scalar for coupon intervals (31556926 for year, smaller for testing)
params._wNok: Address of the mock WNOK token used for the cash leg.

deployBondWithAuction(string,uint64,byte.details: Always creates a RATE auction for initial bond issuance.Coupon yield is set from clearing rate when finalising the auction.Maturity duration is converted to seconds using DURATION_SCALAR (years * scalar = seconds).

params._isin: Human ISIN string for the issuance (used as partition identifier).
params._maturityDuration: Duration in years from bond distribution until maturity.
params._offering: Total supply ceiling (offering size) for this partition.
params._pubKey: Auctioneer public key that matches client-side sealing keys.

extendBondWithAuction(string,uint64,byte.details: Always creates a PRICE auction for bond extensions.Extends the partition offering size before creating the auction.

params._additionalOffering: Additional offering size to add to the partition.
params._isin: Human ISIN string for the existing bond.
params._pubKey: Auctioneer public key that matches client-side sealing keys.

finaliseAuction(string,(string,address,u.details: Settlement enforces a single clearing rate and emits DVPFailed when ERC20 calls revert.For RATE auctions: payment is at full face value (rate represents interest rate).For PRICE auctions: payment is discounted based on price per 100 (rate represents price per 100).

params._proofs: Bidder signatures proving consent to each allocation.

getRoleAdmin(bytes32).details: Returns the admin role that controls `role`. See {grantRole} and {revokeRole}. To change a role's admin, use {_setRoleAdmin}.

grantRole(bytes32,address).details: Grants `role` to `account`. If `account` had not been already granted `role`, emits a {RoleGranted} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleGranted} event.

payCoupon(string,address[]).details: Restricted to BOND_MANAGER_ROLEPayment is atomic for all holdersFlags bond as matured after final coupon payment

params._holders: Array of holder addresses to receive coupon payments

redeem(string,address[]).details: Restricted to BOND_MANAGER_ROLEPasses msg.sender (BOND_MANAGER_ROLE holder) as operatorPayment is atomic for all holders

params._holders: Array of addresses holding the bonds to be redeemed and receiving WNOK payment

renounceRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from the calling account. Roles are often managed via {grantRole} and {revokeRole}: this function's purpose is to provide a mechanism for accounts to lose their privileges if they are compromised (such as when a trusted device is misplaced). If the calling account had been revoked `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must be `callerConfirmation`. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

revokeRole(bytes32,address).details: Revokes `role` from `account`. If `account` had been granted `role`, emits a {RoleRevoked} event. Requirements: - the caller must have ``role``'s admin role. May emit a {RoleRevoked} event.

DURATION_SCALAR().notice: Duration scalar for coupon intervals (for testing vs production)

GOV_TBD().notice: Store target TBD for bond payments (cash leg)

bondActive(string).notice: Assert bond active state to prevent parallel auctions on the same ISIN

buybackWithAuction(string,uint64,bytes,u.notice: Creates a buyback auction for an existing bond without changing the offering ceiling.

cancelAuction(string).notice: Cancel an auction and reduce the offering size while keeping the partition reserved.

closeAuction(string).notice: Closes bidding and retrieves bids for decryption.

deployBondWithAuction(string,uint64,byte.notice: Deploys a new bond with a rate auction (initial bond issuance).

extendBondWithAuction(string,uint64,byte.notice: Extends an existing bond with a price auction (bond extension).

finaliseAuction(string,(string,address,u.notice: Finalises the auction and performs a naive DVP by transferring WNOK and Bond per allocation.

getSealedBids(string).notice: Convenience proxy used by monitoring tools to inspect sealed bids.

payCoupon(string,address[]).notice: Pay coupon to bond holders for a specific ISIN

redeem(string,address[]).notice: Redeem bonds on behalf of holders

withdrawFailedIssuance(string).notice: Allows the issuer to recover bonds that failed to settle during DVP.
